title: DWHud
description: mod that change Diamond World server hud
body:
# DWHud


This mod change vanilla HUD for server Diamond World, aslo it hide old HUD.

This mod can:
###
-Change vanilla server HUD.
###
-Change HUD text color.
###
-Hide vanilla server HUD.
###
-Customization Settings
###

for mod work you need select Scoreboard HUD in server
